Review.Description: Hu aa Wi-Fi service thi satisfied nathi. Plan lidha pachi pan internet stable nathi rehtu. Meeting chalu hoy tyare connection suddenly slow thai jay che ane kaam disturb thay che.
Internet service proper nathi. Kabhi speed sari hoy che pan kabhi ekdum slow thai jay che. Online meeting ane video call ma baar baar problem aave che.
Mane aa company ni Wi-Fi service ma ghani issue face karvi pade che. Connection random time par drop thai jay che, jena karane office work ma interruption aave che.
Plan lidho hato ke internet smooth chalse, pan actual experience khub average che. Browsing, meeting ane video call ma lag aave che. Service improve karvi joie.
Wi-Fi connection reliable nathi. Important call chalu hoy tyare net achanak bandh thai jay che ane pachi thodi vaar ma chalu thay che. Aa bahu irritating che.
Speed plan saro che pan real use ma performance weak lage che. Internet consistent nathi ane work from home mate aa connection par bharoso karvo mushkel che.
Aa company ni service thi disappointed chu. Internet vachche vachche disconnect thay che ane meeting ma voice/video freeze thai jay che. Customer ne aa type ni problem na aavi joie.
Wi-Fi ma stability ni khub kami che. Kabhi internet fast chale che, pan kabhi bina reason slow thai jay che. Online kaam karva mate service dependable nathi.
Hu aa connection office work mate use karu chu, pan frequent interruption aave che. Meeting ma screen share ane voice call ma issue thay che. Service quality improve karo.
Internet random time par stop thai jay che, khas kari ne jyare important kaam chalu hoy. Aa problem regularly face karvi pade che, etle experience kharab che.
Company speed promise kare che pan actual ma connection stable nathi. Kabhi-kabhi net suddenly disconnect thai jay che ane kaam delay thay che.
Wi-Fi service ma baar baar lag ane drop issue aave che. Video meeting ma interruption thava thi professional work ma problem thay che. Service reliable banavvi jaruri che.
Mane aa Wi-Fi plan thi expected quality nathi mali. Internet speed fluctuate thay che ane kabhi connection proper response nathi aaptu. Overall experience poor che.
Online class/meeting time par internet freeze thai jay che. Aavi unstable service thi kaam smoothly thai shaktu nathi. Company e technical issue solve karvo joie.
Connection kabhi-kabhi ekdum slow thai jay che, jena karane video call disconnect thai jay che. Payment full levay che pan service quality consistent nathi.
Aa Wi-Fi service par trust karvo difficult che. Koi pan time internet bandh thai jay che ane pachi reconnect thay che. Important work mate aa problem moti che.
Internet speed ane stability banne ma issue che. Plan lidha pachi pan smooth browsing ane meeting experience nathi malto. Service value for money nathi.
Mane lagyu hatu ke plan upgrade karva thi better internet malse, pan issue same che. Connection drop ane lag problem regularly aave che.
Wi-Fi service ni quality improve karvani jarur che. Meeting, downloading ane normal browsing ma pan speed fluctuate thay che. Customer support e issue seriously levu joie.
Bad experience with this Wi-Fi company. Internet proper rite work nathi kartu, random disconnect thay che ane online work disturb thay che. Service stable nathi.
